({RAWSTMT :stmt_location 0 :stmt_len 93
  :stmt {SELECT
    :targets ({TARGET :expr {BINEXPR :op "??" :left {DOT :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 7 :loc_end 8} :property "name" :loc_start 7 :loc_end 13} :right {STRLIT :val "unknown" :loc_start 17 :loc_end 24} :loc_start 7 :loc_end 24} :alias "displayName" :loc_start 7 :loc_end 41} {TARGET :expr {BINEXPR :op "??" :left {DOT :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 43 :loc_end 44} :property "nickname" :loc_start 43 :loc_end 53} :right {BINEXPR :op "??" :left {DOT :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 57 :loc_end 58} :property "name" :loc_start 57 :loc_end 63} :right {STRLIT :val "anonymous" :loc_start 67 :loc_end 76} :loc_start 57 :loc_end 76} :loc_start 43 :loc_end 76} :alias "nick" :loc_start 43 :loc_end 86})
    :from {CONTAINER :name "c" :loc_start 92 :loc_end 93} :loc_start 0 :loc_end 93}})
